017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.math.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.function.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
028import java.io.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
034
035/**
036 * Session object for {@link JcsSerializer} that produces RFC 8785 canonical JSON.
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
039 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8785">RFC 8785 — JSON Canonicalization Scheme</a>
040 * </ul>
041 */
042@SuppressWarnings({
043   "resource", // Resource management handled externally
044   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
045   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
046   "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for ECMAScript number formatting and map serialization
047})
048public class JcsSerializerSession extends JsonSerializerSession {
049
050   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
051   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
052
053   /**
054    * Builder class.
055    */
056   public static class Builder extends JsonSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
057
058      /**
059       * Constructor
060       *
061       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
062       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
063       */
064      protected Builder(JcsSerializer ctx) {
065         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
066      }
067
068      @Override
069      public JcsSerializerSession build() {
070         return new JcsSerializerSession(this);
071      }
072   }
073
074   /**
075    * Creates a new builder for this object.
076    *
077    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
078    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
079    * @return A new builder.
080    */
081   public static Builder create(JcsSerializer ctx) {
082      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
083   }
084
085   /**
086    * Constructor.
087    *
088    * @param builder The builder for this object.
089    */
090   protected JcsSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
091      super(builder);
092   }
093
094   /**
095    * Converts a number to ECMAScript-compatible JSON string per RFC 8785.
096    *
097    * @param n The number.
098    * @return The serialized string.
099    * @throws SerializeException If the number is NaN or Infinity.
100    */
101   public static String toEcmaNumber(Number n) {
102      if (n instanceof Double d) {
103         if (Double.isNaN(d))
104            throw new SerializeException("NaN is not permitted in JCS (RFC 8785)");
105         if (Double.isInfinite(d))
106            throw new SerializeException("Infinity is not permitted in JCS (RFC 8785)");
107         if (d == -0.0)
108            return "0";
109         return formatDouble(d);
110      }
111      if (n instanceof Float f) {
112         if (Float.isNaN(f))
113            throw new SerializeException("NaN is not permitted in JCS (RFC 8785)");
114         if (Float.isInfinite(f))
115            throw new SerializeException("Infinity is not permitted in JCS (RFC 8785)");
116         if (f == -0.0f)
117            return "0";
118         return formatDouble(f.doubleValue());
119      }
120      if (n instanceof BigDecimal bd)
121         return formatBigDecimal(bd);
122      if (n instanceof BigInteger bi)
123         return formatBigInteger(bi);
124      if (n instanceof Long || n instanceof Integer || n instanceof Short || n instanceof Byte) {
125         var l = n.longValue();
126         if (l == 0)
127            return "0";
128         return Long.toString(l);
129      }
130      return formatDouble(n.doubleValue());
131   }
132
133   private static final double ECMA_FIXED_LOW = 1e-6;
134   private static final double ECMA_FIXED_HIGH = 1e21;
135
136   private static String formatDouble(double d) {
137      if (d == 0.0)
138         return "0";
139      var abs = Math.abs(d);
140      // ECMAScript uses fixed notation for |n| in [1e-6, 1e21), scientific otherwise
141      if (abs >= ECMA_FIXED_LOW && abs < ECMA_FIXED_HIGH) {
142         var s = BigDecimal.valueOf(d).toPlainString();
143         s = stripTrailingZeros(s);
144         return s;
145      }
146      return formatDoubleScientific(d);
147   }
148
149   private static String stripTrailingZeros(String s) {
150      // Non-regex char scan avoids regex backtracking (java:S8786) while preserving exact semantics.
151      if (s.indexOf('.') < 0)
152         return s;
153      var end = s.length();
154      while (end > 0 && s.charAt(end - 1) == '0')
155         end--;
156      if (end > 0 && s.charAt(end - 1) == '.')
157         end--;
158      return s.substring(0, end);
159   }
160
161   private static String formatDoubleScientific(double d) {
162      var s = Double.toString(d);
163      var idxE = s.indexOf('E');
164      if (idxE < 0)
165         idxE = s.indexOf('e');
166      if (idxE >= 0) {
167         var mantissa = s.substring(0, idxE);
168         var exp = s.substring(idxE + 1);
169         var expNum = Integer.parseInt(exp);
170         // ECMAScript: shorten mantissa (1.0 -> 1, 2.5 -> 2.5)
171         mantissa = stripTrailingZeros(mantissa);
172         if (mantissa.equals("1.0") || mantissa.equals("1"))
173            mantissa = "1";
174         else if (mantissa.endsWith(".0"))
175            mantissa = mantissa.substring(0, mantissa.length() - 2);
176         s = mantissa + 'e' + (expNum >= 0 ? "+" + expNum : String.valueOf(expNum));
177      }
178      return s;
179   }
180
181   private static String formatBigDecimal(BigDecimal bd) {
182      try {
183         var d = bd.doubleValue();
184         if (Double.isNaN(d) || Double.isInfinite(d))
185            throw new SerializeException("BigDecimal value exceeds IEEE 754 double range");
186         return formatDouble(d);
187      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
188         throw new SerializeException("BigDecimal value exceeds IEEE 754 double range");
189      }
190   }
191
192   private static String formatBigInteger(BigInteger bi) {
193      try {
194         var l = bi.longValueExact();
195         return Long.toString(l);
196      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") ArithmeticException e) {
197         throw new SerializeException("BigInteger value exceeds IEEE 754 safe integer range");
198      }
199   }
200
201   /**
202    * JCS key comparison: UTF-16 code unit ordering per RFC 8785.
203    *
204    * <p>
205    * Null keys (e.g., from {@code HashMap} with null key) sort before non-null.
206    *
207    * @param a First string.
208    * @param b Second string.
209    * @return Comparison result (negative, zero, or positive).
210    */
211   public static int jcsCompare(String a, String b) {
212      if (a == null)
213         return b == null ? 0 : -1;
214      if (b == null)
215         return 1;
216      var len = Math.min(a.length(), b.length());
217      for (var i = 0; i < len; i++) {
218         var diff = Character.compare(a.charAt(i), b.charAt(i));
219         if (diff != 0)
220            return diff;
221      }
222      return Integer.compare(a.length(), b.length());
223   }
224
225   /**
226    * Opens a low-level push generator that emits raw JSON (NOT canonical JCS) one structural
227    * event at a time, with the {@link TokenWriter#object(Object)} POJO bridge disabled (the
228    * walker would emit ordinary JSON, not canonical JCS).  Use {@link #serializeRecords(Object)}
229    * or {@link #serialize(Object, Object)} for canonical output.
230    *
231    * @param output The output.
232    * @return A new {@link JsonTokenWriter} with {@code object(...)} disabled.
233    * @throws IOException If the output type is not supported or could not be opened.
234    */
235   @Override /* TokenWritable */
236   public TokenWriter serializeTokens(Object output) throws IOException {
237      var walk = new PojoWalker.Options(
238         isKeepNullProperties(),
239         isTrimEmptyMaps(),
240         isTrimEmptyCollections(),
241         isSortMaps(),
242         isSortCollections(),
243         isTrimStrings(),
244         getMarshallingContext());
245      var settings = new JsonTokenWriter.Settings(
246         isUseWhitespace(),
247         getMaxIndent(),
248         getQuoteChar(),
249         isEscapeSolidus(),
250         isTrimStrings(),
251         false /* simpleAttrs */,
252         walk,
253         true /* disableObject — JCS canonicalization can't be expressed via the POJO walker */);
254      return JsonTokenWriter.forOutput(output, settings);
255   }
256
257   /**
258    * Returns a record writer that emits canonical JCS for each value passed to
259    * {@link RecordWriter#write(Object) write(...)} (delegates to this session's
260    * {@link #serialize(Object, Object)}).
261    *
262    * @param output The output.
263    * @return A new {@link RecordWriter}.
264    * @throws IOException If the output type is not supported or could not be opened.
265    */
266   @Override /* RecordWritable */
267   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
268      return RecordAdapter.writer(this, output);
269   }
270
271   @Override /* RecordWritable */
272   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
273
274   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSerializerSession */
275   protected JsonWriter getJsonWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
276      var output = out.getRawOutput();
277      if (output instanceof JcsWriter w)
278         return w;
279      var w = new JcsWriter(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), isEscapeSolidus(), getQuoteChar(), false, isTrimStrings(), getUriResolver());
280      out.setWriter(w);
281      return w;
282   }
283
284   @SuppressWarnings({
285      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic collection/map serialization
286      "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts in collection/map serialization
287   })
288   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSerializerSession - package visibility, override by making accessible */
289   protected SerializerWriter serializeMap(JsonWriter out, Map m, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
290      var keyType = type.getKeyType();
291      var valueType = type.getValueType();
292
293      var entries = new ArrayList<Map.Entry<?,?>>(m.entrySet());
294      entries.sort((a, b) -> jcsCompare(toString(a.getKey()), toString(b.getKey())));
295
296      var i = indent;
297      out.w('{');
298
299      var addComma = Flag.create();
300      for (Map.Entry<?,?> x : entries) {
301         Object value = x.getValue();
302         Object key = generalize(x.getKey(), keyType);
303         addComma.ifSet(() -> out.w(',').smi(i)).set();
304         out.cr(i).attr(toString(key)).w(':').s(i);
305         serializeAnything(out, value, valueType, (key == null ? null : toString(key)), null);
306      }
307
308      out.cre(i - 1).w('}');
309      return out;
310   }
311
312   private static class BeanProp implements Map.Entry<String, Object> {
313      final BeanPropertyMeta pMeta;
314      final String key;
315      final Object value;
316
317      BeanProp(BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, String key, Object value) {
318         this.pMeta = pMeta;
319         this.key = key;
320         this.value = value;
321      }
322
323      @Override
324      public String getKey() { return key; }
325
326      @Override
327      public Object getValue() { return value; }
328
329      @Override
330      public Object setValue(Object val) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); }
331   }
332
333   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSerializerSession */
334   protected SerializerWriter serializeBeanMap(JsonWriter out, BeanMap<?> m, String typeName) throws SerializeException {
335      var entries = new ArrayList<BeanProp>();
336      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
337
338      m.forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, value, thrown) -> {
339         if (nn(thrown))
340            onBeanGetterException(pMeta, thrown);
341         if (canIgnoreValue(pMeta, key, value))
342            return;
343         entries.add(new BeanProp(pMeta, key, value));
344      });
345
346      // Add _type property if present, then sort all by key using JCS UTF-16 comparison
347      if (nn(typeName)) {
348         var pm = m.getMeta().getTypeProperty();
349         entries.add(new BeanProp(pm, pm.getName(), typeName));
350      }
351      entries.sort((a, b) -> jcsCompare(a.getKey(), b.getKey()));
352
353      var i = indent;
354      out.w('{');
355
356      var addComma = Flag.create();
357      for (var entry : entries) {
358         addComma.ifSet(() -> out.append(',').smi(i)).set();
359         out.cr(i).attr(entry.getKey()).w(':').s(i);
360         serializeAnything(out, entry.getValue(), (ClassMeta<?>) entry.pMeta.getBeanInfo(), entry.getKey(), entry.pMeta);
361      }
362
363      out.cre(i - 1).w('}');
364      return out;
365   }
366}
